steps.title: Identify the price relationship
steps.content:
We're told that $x$ is the price of a ticket during the event, and the price during the event is $3 less than before. This means:

$$\text{Price before event} = x + 3$$

We need this relationship to set up the revenue expressions correctly.

steps.title: Build the revenue equation
steps.content:
The team sells tickets in two periods:
  • Before the event: 140 tickets at price $(x+3)$ each → revenue = $140(x+3)$
  • During the event: 220 tickets at price $x$ each → revenue = $220x$

Total revenue from all tickets:
$$140(x+3) + 220x$$

steps.title: Translate the revenue requirement
steps.content:
The problem states they need to raise at least $\$5{,}820$. The phrase "at least" means the total revenue must be greater than or equal to this amount:

$$140(x+3) + 220x \ge 5{,}820$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
